title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HP India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
